claimText: The Swachh Vayu Sarveshan Award is announced by the MoEFCC, with Indore ranking 1st in Category 1 (population >10 lakh) for 2025.
evidenceExcerpt: Awards announced by MoEFCC recognizing best-performing cities among 130 NCAP cities. Category 1 (>10 lakh) won by Indore
examUse: Statement-based question on the nodal ministry and top-performing cities in air quality.
distractorHooks: Announced by MoHUA instead of MoEFCC
Surat or Bhopal instead of Indore

claimText: The National Clean Air Programme (NCAP) targets up to a 40% reduction in PM10 levels or achieving national ambient air quality standards by 2025-26 from 2019-20 levels.
evidenceExcerpt: NCAP targets up to a 40% reduction in PM10 levels by 2025-26 from 2019-20 levels.
examUse: Statement-based question on specific environmental targets and base years.

claimText: NCAP covers 131 non-attainment and Million Plus Cities across 24 States/UTs.
evidenceExcerpt: NCAP covers 131 non-attainment and Million Plus Cities across 24 States/UTs.
examUse: Statement-based question on the scope and coverage of NCAP.

claimText: NCAP is implemented by the Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) and its implementation is monitored via the PRANA portal.
evidenceExcerpt: Implemented by CPCB and monitored via the PRANA portal.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question matching environmental programs with their monitoring portals.
